D1 Optics L3 Apply Reference

Huygens-Fresnel Wavelets

narrow a slit and watch secondary wavelets fan out as a circular wavefront

Every point on a wavefront acts as a source of secondary spherical wavelets — their envelope is the next wavefront.

Slide the slit width a downward. When a is much larger than λ, the wave stays nearly straight; when a approaches λ, the wavelets fan out into a wide cone.
